; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"hello\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"world\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_printTimes
define void @InputKt_printTimes(ptr %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %merge_4 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 1
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t1 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t2 = icmp sle i32 %t1, %arg1
  br i1 %t2, label %bb2, label %bb4
bb2:
  call i32 @puts(ptr %arg0)
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t4 = add i32 0, 1
  %t5 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t6 = add i32 %t5, %t4
  store i32 %t6, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb1
bb4:
  ret void
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 3
  call void @InputKt_printTimes(ptr @.str.0, i32 %t0)
  %t1 = add i32 0, 2
  call void @InputKt_printTimes(ptr @.str.1, i32 %t1)
  ret i32 0
}
